title: Tsar@phath #6886
definition:
Zarephath = "refinery"

 1) a city on the coast south of Sidon and the residence of Elijah
    during the last part of the drought; modern 'Sura-fend'
nasbUsage:

 1) a city on the coast south of Sidon and the residence of Elijah
    during the last part of the drought; modern 'Sura-fend'

    NASB:  smelting place, a city S. of Sidon
